---
title: Theme Array Subdirectory Test
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - vapor
      - custom-sub.scss
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "smoke-test-subdir-rule", "#def456"]
---

## Theme Array in Subdirectory

This tests that a theme array with a built-in theme (vapor) plus a
custom SCSS file works when the document and custom file are in a
project subdirectory.
